S.FORM: O Ci'i Pintu (Holam: Ť®ėśÜ∂śčľŚúĖ, ira ko Pintu no ca'emotan) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2015 a miheca saka 12 a folad saka 26 a romi'ad 9:00 dadaya. Mianingaya a patingso^ Panai : Low Fu-mey Inaan no Panai : Ye Hung Nayaw: Low Ca-un
S.PHON: o~u ¶i °i pinto~u~u (ńßo~u…ĺam: ****, ira ko~u pinto~u~u no~u ¶a °…ômo~utan) ¶a ¶…ôj kamo~uko~u °aj a ti…ĺifi …ô*a i tajwan. misaŇča ° pipańßo~uso~uan to~u ti…ĺifi no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-min ¶i ina to~u ti…ĺifi …ô*a. mipasa…¨~…ģak to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ *:** …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja. mianiŇčaja a patiŇčso~u Ē panai : …ĺo~uw fo~u~u-m…ôj inaan no~u panai : j…ô ńßo~u~uŇč najaw: …ĺo~uw ¶a-o~u~un
S.FORM: O Ci'i Pintu (Holam: Ť®ėśÜ∂śčľŚúĖ, ira ko Pintu no ca'emotan) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2015 a miheca saka 12 a folad saka 26 a romi'ad 9:00 dadaya. Mianingaya a patingso^ Panai : Low Fu-mey Inaan no Panai : Ye Hung Nayaw: Low Ca-un
